title: Lol Surprise Jewellery Box Craft Kit For Girls - Decorate Your Own Jewellery Box With Gemstones And Stickers - Fun Party Activity And Gift For Girls - Store And Organise Jewellery
features: LOL Jewellery Box - Create Your Own Jewellery Box For Girls - A Great Place For All A Girls Important Keepsakes And Jewellery - Each Jewellery Box Comes With A Pre-printed Lol Surprise Design On The Outside

LOL Surprise Gift Included, Plus Stickers And Gemstones To Decorate And Make Something Extremely Unique - The Jewellery Box Features A Hinged Lid, Perfect For Storing And Organising Girls Jewellery Collection

LOL Gifts For Girls - The Kit Includes A Variety Of Lol Surprise Stickers And Gemstones To Add To The Jewellery Box For A Personalized Touch. Made From Sturdy, Durable Cardboard Material That Can Withstand Frequent Use

Girls Jewellery Box - Suitable For Children Aged 4 And Above, Providing A Fun And Interactive Activity For Girls Who Love Lol Surprise. Includes Glitter Tiles, Lol Surprise Stickers, Gemstones And 2 Surprise Gift Bags
Kids Jewellery Box - LOL Dolls Surprise Included - 2 Surprise Gift Bags Also Included. Great To Keep Jewellery And As An Arts And Crafts Gift For Girls
description: Product Description Jewellery Storage For Girls - The Decorate Your Own Jewellery Box Is A Fun And Creative Activity For Girls Who Love Lol Surprise - Kids' Craft Kits - The Kit Includes A Pre-printed Jewellery Box With A Lol Surprise Design On The Outside, Stickers And Gemstones, And A Variety Of Lol Surprise Characters And Elements To Add To The Jewellery Box For A Personalized Touch - Toys For 5 Year Old Girls - Childrens Jewellery Boxes - Girls Hair Accessories The Hinged Lid Jewellery Box Also Features An Extra Storage Draw Inside, Perfect For Storing And Trying On Jewellery - Paint Your Own Sets For Kids - Made From Sturdy, Durable Cardboard Material That Can Withstand Frequent Use, This Kit Is Suitable For Children Aged 4 And Above - Gifts For 10 Year Olds Girls This Activity Is Perfect For A Birthday Party, Sleepover, Or As A Gift For A Child Who Loves The Lol Surprise Brand - Childrens Jewellery Box - Not Only It Is A Fun Activity But Also It Serves As A Practical Storage Solution For Their Jewellery Collection. Makes An Ideal Gift, Gifts For 5 Year Old Girls, Gifts For 6 Year Old Girls And Gifts For 7 Year Old Girls Can Be Used As A Decorative Item, Girls Can Display Their Decorated Lol Omg Jewellery Box In Their Room As A Decorative Item, Adding A Personal Touch To Their Space - Hair Accessories For Girls - Jewellery Making Kit - Jewellery Box Kids - Omg Lol Dolls - Kids Jewellery Box For Girls Lol Surprise Jewellery Box For Girls - Contains Lol Surprise Inside! Jewellery Making Kit For Girls This adorable LOL jewellery box would make a brilliant gift for an LOL lover or for someone that shows an interest in jewellery and all things girly. Gift as Christmas gifts for girls, birthday gifts for girls, stocking fillers for kids, Easter gifts for kids & much more. Contents Include; 1 x Jewellery box 8 x Sheets of glitter mosaic 1 x Sheet of stickers Gemstones 2 x Surprise gift bags Lol Girls Jewellery Box This kit contains everything a little girl needs to decorate their very own jewellery box. Use all of the cute accessories provided and decorate till your hearts content and keep all of your lol jewellery in there. LOL Surprise Mosaic Jewellery Box Brand LOL Manufacturer RMS International UK Ltd Measurements 10 x 20 x 15 cm Contents Include 1 x Jewellery box, 8 x Sheets of glitter mosaic, 1 x Sheet of stickers, Gemstones, 2 x Surprise gift bags Age Specification 6+
